class.name: UnityBuildStep
class.description: Provides build facilities for Unity projects

param.name: teamcity.build.workingDir
param.description: [Build working directory](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/?Build+Working+Directory) for script, specify it if it is different from the [checkout directory](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/teamcity/?Build+Checkout+Directory).

param.name: projectPath
param.description: Specify the path to the target project. If unspecified, the working directory will be used.

param.name: executeMethod
param.description: Specify a static method reference to execute after the project is loaded. The class should be located in the Assets/Editor project directory.

param.name: buildProfile
param.description: Specify the project-relative path to a Unity Build Profile asset (e.g. Assets/Settings/Build Profiles/Android-Release.asset). When set, -activeBuildProfile is used instead of -buildTarget. Requires Unity 6 (6000.x) or later.

param.name: buildTarget
param.description: Specify an active build target before loading the project. Not used when Build Profile is set.

param.name: buildPlayerPath
param.description: Specify the output path for the player binary. When Build Profile is set, this path is passed to -build instead of -buildPlayer.

option.name: editorTests
option.description: Run editor tests from the project

param.name: unityVersion
param.description: Specify the required Unity version, e.g. 2018.2. If left blank, the version specified in the project settings will be selected if available. Otherwise, the latest Unity installed on the agent will be chosen for the build.

param.name: unityRoot
param.description: Specify a custom path to Unity, e.g C:\UnityEditor\2022.3.15f1. Paths relative to the checkout directory are supported.

param.name: noGraphics
param.description: Do not initialize the graphics device

param.name: silentCrashes
param.description: Do not display the error dialog when a standalone player crashes

param.name: noQuit
param.description: Do not quit the Unity Editor after other commands have finished executing
